overview: Command R (03-2024) is a large language model from Cohere, part of the Command R line. Released 2024-03-11. Scalable R-series model optimized for RAG, tool use, and long context.
What's notable in this version: Original Command R: 128K context, RAG and tool-use focus, 10 primary languages; deprecated Sept 15, 2025.
